who: sales operations teams using Salesforce for contract management
offer: For sales operations teams processing 10–20 contracts/month, missed deadlines cause cash flow gaps. We send automated reminders instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem: Missed contract renewal deadlines due to lack of timely reminders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for sales operations teams
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on contract management
DM outreach to sales operations teams with demo video
Share insights in community forums for Salesforce users
try_it: Let users try customizable reminder settings on 1-3 contracts
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the tool
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow users to save common inputs as templates
